items.title: Standards-mode document skeleton: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Declare doctype, language, character encoding, viewport and body content correctly. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating standards document metadata and explicit language; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted authoring draft. Runtime evidence does not replace independent human standards, pedagogy, accessibility, answer-oracle, and formal-exam review.

hints: Implement the smallest artifact that satisfies the declared observable contract, then check the visible case before considering the hidden boundary.

feedback.correct: The locked authoring verifier observed the declared bounded facet in both visible and hidden cases.
feedback.incorrect: At least one deterministic authoring check failed; inspect the exact artifact, interaction state, viewport, and observable result without assuming hidden-case details.

criteria.description: Passes the visible and hidden deterministic checks for the declared implementation facet in its pinned authoring environment.
